body_text:
22:19 â August 15, 2022
Central 1 File Specifications Update
We added file specifications for Ontario qualified debit clearing items to the Payment Solutions Manual and added references to the XDREC and XQREC files (for BC and Ontario).
Access and Administration Volume
Central 1âs File Specifications Part
Section 1.4, File Specifications Document Library
We added a link to the file specifications document for qualified debit clearing items in Ontario.
Section 5.3, Qualified Debit Clearing Items
We added the Ontario file specifications document to the list of available specifications for qualified debit clearing items.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Incoming Clearing Items
Section 1.4, Incoming Clearing Items Document Library
We added links to the available file specifications for DREC and QREC (BC Only), XDREC and XQREC (BC and Ontario), and DCPA and QCPA (Ontario Only).
Section 2.1, Definitions
We added definitions for the DCPA and QCPA files for Ontario; and we removed the definition for Posting File (Ontario Only). We added definitions for the XDREC and XQREC files that use an XML message format (BC and Ontario).
Section 4.4, Unqualified Clearing Items
We replaced the term âPosting Fileâ with DCPA and QCPA file references, and we added references to XDREC/XQREC files. We removed references to late unqualified clearing items since these no longer apply.
Section 6.1, Settlement and Reconciliation of Incoming Clearing Items to the Credit Unionâs Central 1 Account
We clarified how settlement is reported on the credit unionâs statement. We removed references to late unqualified clearing items since these no longer apply.
Section 6.2, Settlement of Incoming Clearing Items to Membersâ Accounts
We updated references for the Ontario clearing files (DCPA and QCPA) and added references for XDREC and XQREC as applicable.
